metadata.description: HarnessFlow — From idea to shipped product: high-quality engineering workflows for AI agents. Spec-anchored SDD, gated TDD, evidence-based routing, independent reviews, and formal closeout.

plugins.name: harness-flow
plugins.description: HarnessFlow skill pack: 24 hf-* skills covering discovery -> spec -> design -> tasks -> TDD -> reviews -> gates -> finalize -> verify (hf-browser-testing, v0.2.0) -> release (hf-release, v0.4.0), with evidence-based routing. v0.6.0 introduces agents/hf-orchestrator.md as the always-on agent persona that replaces using-hf-workflow + hf-workflow-router (now deprecated aliases through v0.6.x). This locks the HF three-layer architecture invariant per ADR-007 D1: Doer Skills (12) / Reviewer-Gate Skills (11) / Orchestrator Agent (1). The orchestrator is auto-loaded by every supported host (Cursor .cursor/rules/harness-flow.mdc / Claude Code CLAUDE.md + .claude-plugin/plugin.json agents[] / OpenCode AGENTS.md). v0.6.0 only does Step 1 of ADR-007 D3's 6-step landing path (build orchestrator + 3-host stubs + deprecate-alias old skills); leaf skill content is unchanged this round. Skill set stays at 24 hf-* + 1 orchestrator agent; slash commands stay at 7. v0.5.x carryover: closeout HTML companion in hf-finalize (skills/hf-finalize/scripts/render-closeout-html.py per ADR-006 4-subdir skill anatomy); v0.4.0 hf-release release-tier standalone skill decoupled from orchestrator (engineer-level release; deployment / staged rollout / monitoring / rollback remain v0.7+ planned hf-shipping-and-launch). v0.3.0 supports 3 clients (Claude Code + OpenCode + Cursor).
